message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title RTP Audio Transmission Sequence Diagram

' Define participants with their groupings
rectangle "RTP" #LightSalmon {
    participant "RtpSenderEgress" as RtpSenderEgress
    participant "ModuleRtpRtcpImpl" as ModuleRtpRtcpImpl
    participant "PacketRouter" as PacketRouter
    participant "ProcessThreadImpl" as ProcessThreadImpl
    participant "PacingController" as PacingController
    participant "PacedSender" as PacedSender
    participant "RTPSender" as RTPSender
    participant "RTPSenderAudio" as RTPSenderAudio
}

rectangle "Call" #LightSalmon {
    participant "AudioCodingModuleImpl" as AudioCodingModuleImpl
    participant "ChannelReceive" as ChannelReceive
    participant "ChannelSend" as ChannelSend
    participant "AcmReceiver" as AcmReceiver
}

rectangle "NetEq" #LightSalmon {
    participant "AudioSendStream" as AudioSendStream
    participant "AudioMixerImpl" as AudioMixerImpl
    participant "AudioTransportImpl" as AudioTransportImpl
}

rectangle "Audio" #LightSalmon {
    participant "AudioDeviceBuffer" as AudioDeviceBuffer
    participant "AudioTrackJni" as AudioTrackJni
    participant "AudioRecordJni" as AudioRecordJni
}

' Sequence of interactions from right to left (as shown in diagram)
activate AudioRecordJni
AudioRecordJni -> AudioRecordJni: DataIsRecorded()
deactivate AudioRecordJni

activate AudioTrackJni
AudioRecordJni -> AudioTrackJni: DeliverRecordedData()
deactivate AudioTrackJni

activate AudioDeviceBuffer
AudioTrackJni -> AudioDeviceBuffer: RecordedDataIsAvailable()
deactivate AudioDeviceBuffer

activate AudioTransportImpl
AudioDeviceBuffer -> AudioTransportImpl: SendAudioData()
deactivate AudioTransportImpl

activate AudioSendStream
AudioTransportImpl -> AudioSendStream: ProcessAndEncodeAudio()
deactivate AudioSendStream

activate ChannelSend
AudioSendStream -> ChannelSend: Add10MsData()
deactivate ChannelSend

activate AudioCodingModuleImpl
ChannelSend -> AudioCodingModuleImpl: Encode()
deactivate AudioCodingModuleImpl

activate ChannelSend
AudioCodingModuleImpl -> ChannelSend: SendData()
deactivate ChannelSend

activate ChannelReceive
ChannelSend -> ChannelReceive: SendRtpAudio()
deactivate ChannelReceive

activate RTPSenderAudio
ChannelReceive -> RTPSenderAudio: SendAudio()
deactivate RTPSenderAudio

activate RTPSender
RTPSenderAudio -> RTPSender: SendToNetwork()
deactivate RTPSender

activate PacedSender
RTPSender -> PacedSender: EnqueuePackets()
deactivate PacedSender

activate PacingController
PacedSender -> PacingController: ProcessPackets()
deactivate PacingController

activate ProcessThreadImpl
PacingController -> ProcessThreadImpl: SendRtpPacket()
deactivate ProcessThreadImpl

activate PacketRouter
ProcessThreadImpl -> PacketRouter: SendPacket()
deactivate PacketRouter

activate ModuleRtpRtcpImpl
PacketRouter -> ModuleRtpRtcpImpl: TrySendPacket()
deactivate ModuleRtpRtcpImpl

activate RtpSenderEgress
ModuleRtpRtcpImpl -> RtpSenderEgress: SendPacket()
deactivate RtpSenderEgress

RtpSenderEgress -> RtpSenderEgress: SendPacketToNetwork()

@enduml
```
